summary: Phase 2 UI/UX Overhaul testing completed. All 13 Phase 2 features tested and verified. Command palette keyboard navigation, badge styling, table row hover, input focus ring, and empty state visuals all working correctly.

issues: Platform Super Admin badge uses hardcoded Tailwind classes (bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 border-violet-200) instead of aa-badge-* CSS variable-based classes. This is intentional in roleBadgeColor() but may not adapt correctly in dark mode

test_results.command_palette_ctrl_k: PASS - Opens correctly with Ctrl+K, data-testid='command-palette' confirmed
test_results.command_palette_arrow_down: PASS - ArrowDown highlights: Users -> Customers -> Products sequentially
test_results.command_palette_arrow_up: PASS - ArrowUp moves back: Products -> Customers
test_results.command_palette_enter_navigate: PASS - Enter on 'Users' search result navigates to Users tab, palette closes
test_results.command_palette_escape_close: PASS - Escape closes command palette (palette removed from DOM)
test_results.command_palette_search_filter: PASS - Typing 'Users' shows '1 result', active index resets to first item
test_results.users_tab_role_badge: PASS - 'Platform Super Admin' badge has aa-badge class + violet Tailwind colors (as designed)
test_results.users_tab_status_badge: PASS - 'Active' badge uses aa-badge aa-badge-success classes
test_results.users_tab_status_dot: PASS - aa-status-dot class found on status indicator
test_results.users_tab_aa_table_row: PASS - Row has aa-table-row class, hover shows inset box-shadow: rgb(30,64,175) 3px 0px 0px 0px inset (left accent bar)
test_results.products_tab_empty_state: PASS - aa-empty-geo visual shown with 'No products found'
test_results.enquiries_tab_empty_state: PASS - aa-empty-geo visual shown with 'No enquiries found'
test_results.table_row_hover_accent_bar: PASS - First td shows rgb(30, 64, 175) 3px inset box-shadow on hover
test_results.input_focus_ring: PASS - border-color changes to rgb(30,64,175), focus-visible:ring-2 class applied
test_results.aa_css_classes_defined: PASS - All classes verified: aa-skel, aa-badge, aa-badge-success/danger/warning/accent/muted, aa-empty-geo, aa-table-row
test_results.skeleton_loaders_visual: NOT CAPTURED - Loads too fast for visual test, code and CSS both verified correct
test_results.products_badges_with_data: NOT TESTED - Empty DB, no products to verify Active/Inactive/Subscription/One-time badges
test_results.enquiries_badges_with_data: NOT TESTED - Empty DB, no enquiries to verify Pending/Responded/Closed badge styling

action_items: Optional: Seed Products/Enquiries data to test Active/Inactive/Subscription/One-time and Pending/Responded/Closed badge styling
Optional: Verify dark mode adaptability of role badge Tailwind classes (bg-violet-100 may not invert correctly in dark theme)
critical_code_review_comments: Role badge in UsersTab uses Tailwind hardcoded colors (bg-violet-100 text-violet-700) instead of CSS variable-based aa-badge-* classes. Could break in dark mode if dark overrides are not applied to those Tailwind colors.
Skeleton loaders (.aa-skel) correctly implemented and CSS defined - too fast to capture visually but code is correct.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Products, Enquiries, Orders, Subscriptions tabs are all empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 UI features all working. Command palette (Ctrl+K) is the main feature and passes all keyboard navigation tests. Users tab has 1 user (Automate Accounts Admin) with Platform Super Admin role badge (violet). Products/Enquiries/Orders/Subscriptions tabs are empty (no data in DB). To test those tab status badges (Active/Inactive/Pending etc.), seed data would need to be created first. aa-table-row hover, input focus ring, aa-empty-geo, aa-badge-success all verified.
